articles.title: 4 takeaways: Thunder bench picks up Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, elevates OKC to Game 3 win - NBA
articles.description: With a record-setting bench performance, the Thunder stake a 2-1 series lead on a 123-108 victory in Game 3 on the road.

articles.title: NCAA opened tampering investigation of Ole Miss on the same day Dabo Swinney complained - NBC Sports
articles.description: When it comes to the rules regarding players, the NCAA has largely become toothless.

articles.title: Mitch Garver’s homer sends Mariners past Royals - The Seattle Times
articles.description: The Mariners got a strong pitching performance from starter Logan Gilbert, and Mitch Garver provided all the needed offense with a two-run homer to beat the Royals on Friday night.

articles.title: Bears focused on two suburban areas for new stadium with no ‘viable site’ in Chicago - New York Post
articles.description: The Bears might not be playing in Chicago for much longer.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark, Sophie Cunningham's Final Box Score Stats, Highlights as Fever Beat Valkyries - Bleacher Report
articles.description: Caitlin Clark led the charge as the Indiana Fever and Sophie Cunningham rolled to a 90-82 home victory over the Golden State Valkyries on Friday, improving to 4-2 on the season.

articles.title: No. 4 Nebraska softball crushes No. 13 Oklahoma State 8-1 in Supers - On3
articles.description: No. 4 Nebraska softball crushes No. 13 Oklahoma State 8-1 in Lincoln Super Regionals. If win on Saturday, heading to WCWS

articles.title: Red Sox To Begin Playing Marcelo Mayer At Shortstop - MLB Trade Rumors
articles.description: For the first time in his MLB career, Marcelo Mayer will get a look as the Red Sox's starting shortstop. Read more at MLB Trade Rumors.

articles.title: Victor Wembanyama, Chet Holmgren Headline 2025-26 NBA All-Defensive Team - Bleacher Report
articles.description: San Antonio Spurs center Victor Wembanyama and Oklahoma City Thunder forward Chet Holmgren were officially announced as members of the 2025-26 NBA All-Defensive First Team on Friday.

articles.title: Knicks’ Jalen Brunson is creating the Donovan Mitchell doubts more than anyone - New York Post
articles.description: The history between Jalen Brunson and Donovan Mitchell is so long and cordial that it’s been largely ignored or forgotten in the conference finals.

articles.title: Anthony Volpe To Start Second Base Work - MLB Trade Rumors
articles.description: Now that José Caballero is back on the roster, Anthony Volpe will begin expanding his defensive versatility. MLB Trade Rumors has more.

articles.title: Mets designate veteran reliever Craig Kimbrel for assignment - ESPN
articles.description: The Mets designated 37-year-old reliever Craig Kimbrel for assignment Friday after 14 appearances with the club.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark explains Indiana Fever injury report confusion: 'At the end of the day, it's me and my confidence' - Awful Announcing
articles.description: The Indiana Fever had a controversy on their hands on Wednesday when they announced superstar Caitlin Clark was inactive due to a back injury.

articles.title: NASCAR's Kyle Busch was short of breath, coughing up blood a day before death, 911 call reveals - PBS
articles.description: Busch died Thursday at age 41. No cause of death has been given, though his family said earlier he had been hospitalized with a “severe illness” three days before he was to compete in the Coca-Cola 600 at Charlotte Motor Speedway.

articles.title: Report: Cardinals and Jacoby Brissett are "significantly" far apart in negotiations - NBC Sports
articles.description: Brissett is not participating in the team's voluntary offseason program as he seeks a reworked deal for this season.

articles.title: Russell grabs pole position in Canada Sprint Qualifying ahead of Antonelli and Norris - Formula 1
articles.description: George Russell will line up in pole position for the Sprint at the Canadian Grand Prix, with the Mercedes driver set to share the front row with team mate Kimi Antonelli.

articles.title: Women's Lacrosse Races Past Maryland, 16-6, Into NCAA Final - University of North Carolina Athletics
articles.description: Defending NCAA champion Carolina closed the game on a 13-3 run and dominated Maryland, 16-6, behind five goals each from Chloe Humphrey and Addison Pattillo .

articles.title: Video: Brawl breaks out at PFL Brussels ceremonial weigh-ins, Dan Hardy caught in the middle - MMA Fighting
articles.description: A brawl broke out during the PFL Brussels ceremonial weigh-ins

articles.title: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signs "Teddy Bridgewater Act" bill into law - On3
articles.description: Another bill signed off by Florida governor Ron DeSantis was Senate Bill 178, better known as the "Teddy Bridgewater Act"

articles.title: Division I Cabinet continues discussions of age-based collegiate eligibility model - NCAA.org
articles.description: The Division I Cabinet on Friday discussed possible implementation of an age-based eligibility model, should the concept ultimately be formally proposed and approved. The Cabinet also signaled that it would consider voting on the age-based eligibility mode…
